mapper.sql: SELECT "CountyDistrict" AS countyDistrict, "Town" AS town, "Village" AS village, "Area" AS area, "Contract Quantity" AS contractQuantity, "Acquisition Volume" AS acquisitionVolume, "Tobacco farming households" AS tobaccoFarming, "Tobacco technicians" AS tobaccoTechnic, "Roasting rooms" AS roastingRooms, "Seedling Shelters" AS seedlingShelter, "Remarks" AS remarks, "Year" AS year FROM public."SanmingTobaccoProductionSituation"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public."SanmingTobaccoProductionSituation" ( "CountyDistrict", "Town", "Village", "Area", "Contract Quantity", "Acquisition Volume", "Tobacco farming households", "Tobacco technicians", "Roasting rooms", "Seedling Shelters", "Remarks", "Year" ) VALUES ( #{countyDistrict}, #{town}, #{village}, #{area}, #{contractQuantity}, #{acquisitionVolume}, #{tobaccoFarming}, #{tobaccoTechnic}, #{roastingRooms}, #{seedlingShelter}, #{remarks}, #{year} )
